// ─── PERSONAL INFO ────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const personalInfo = {
  name: "Sujitha V",
  role: "AI & Data Science Engineer",
  tagline: "Building intelligent solutions with data, AI, and modern technologies.",
  email: "sujitha@example.com",          // ← replace
  phone: "+91 98765 43210",              // ← replace
  linkedin: "https://linkedin.com/in/sujithav",  // ← replace
  github: "https://github.com/sujithav",          // ← replace
  location: "Tamil Nadu, India",
  resumeUrl: "/resume.pdf",
  profilePhoto: "/profile-photo.jpg",
  bio: `I am a passionate and curious AI and Data Science student who enjoys solving real-world problems
using technology. I have experience in machine learning, data analytics, web development, and
problem-solving. I am continuously learning and building projects that create meaningful impact.`,
  careerObjective: `To secure an internship or entry-level role where I can apply my skills in AI,
machine learning, and data science to build impactful solutions and grow as a technology professional.`,
};

// ─── SKILLS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const skillsData = {
  languages: [
    { name: "Python", level: 88, icon: "SiPython" },
    { name: "Java", level: 72, icon: "SiJava" },
    { name: "SQL", level: 80, icon: "SiMysql" },
    { name: "JavaScript", level: 70, icon: "SiJavascript" },
  ],
  technologies: [
    { name: "Machine Learning", level: 82, icon: "SiTensorflow" },
    { name: "Data Science", level: 80, icon: "SiPandas" },
    { name: "React.js", level: 70, icon: "SiReact" },
    { name: "HTML & CSS", level: 85, icon: "SiHtml5" },
    { name: "Tailwind CSS", level: 75, icon: "SiTailwindcss" },
    { name: "Git & GitHub", level: 78, icon: "SiGit" },
  ],
  tools: [
    { name: "Jupyter Notebook", level: 85, icon: "SiJupyter" },
    { name: "VS Code", level: 90, icon: "SiVisualstudiocode" },
    { name: "Power BI", level: 68, icon: "SiPowerbi" },
    { name: "MySQL", level: 78, icon: "SiMysql" },
    { name: "Google Colab", level: 88, icon: "SiGooglecolab" },
  ],
};

// ─── PROJECTS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const projects = [
  {
    id: 1,
    title: "Smart Disease Predictor",
    description: "A machine learning web app that predicts diseases based on symptoms using Random Forest and SVM classifiers with 94% accuracy.",
    image: "/project-images/project1.jpg",
    tags: ["Machine Learning", "Python", "Flask"],
    category: "ml",
    github: "https://github.com/sujithav/disease-predictor",   // ← replace
    demo: "",
    featured: true,
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    title: "Sales Analytics Dashboard",
    description: "Interactive Power BI dashboard providing real-time sales insights, trend analysis, and KPI tracking for retail data.",
    image: "/project-images/project2.jpg",
    tags: ["Power BI", "SQL", "Data Analytics"],
    category: "data",
    github: "https://github.com/sujithav/sales-dashboard",     // ← replace
    demo: "",
    featured: true,
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    title: "NLP Sentiment Analyzer",
    description: "Deep learning model to classify customer reviews as positive, negative, or neutral using LSTM networks and BERT embeddings.",
    image: "/project-images/project3.jpg",
    tags: ["NLP", "Python", "TensorFlow"],
    category: "ml",
    github: "https://github.com/sujithav/sentiment-analyzer",  // ← replace
    demo: "",
    featured: false,
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    title: "Portfolio Website",
    description: "A fully responsive, animated personal portfolio built with React.js and Tailwind CSS to showcase projects and achievements.",
    image: "/project-images/project4.jpg",
    tags: ["React.js", "Tailwind CSS", "Framer Motion"],
    category: "web",
    github: "https://github.com/sujithav/portfolio",           // ← replace
    demo: "",

];

export const achievements = [
  {
    id: 1,
    title: "Best Project Award – Smart India Hackathon",
    description: "Won Best Project Award at SIH 2024 for developing an AI-powered crop disease detection system benefiting 2000+ farmers.",

    category: "hackathon",
  },
  {
    id: 2,

  {

  },

];

// ─── EXPERIENCE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const experiences = [
  {
    id: 1,
    type: "internship",
    title: "Machine Learning Intern",
    org: "TechCorp Solutions",          // ← replace
    duration: "Jun 2024 – Aug 2024",
    description: "Built and deployed a customer churn prediction model using XGBoost, achieving 89% accuracy. Worked on data cleaning, feature engineering, and model evaluation pipelines.",
    skills: ["Python", "XGBoost", "Pandas", "Scikit-learn"],
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    type: "hackathon",
    title: "Smart India Hackathon 2024",
    org: "Ministry of Education, India",
    duration: "Nov 2024",

    skills: ["TensorFlow", "React Native", "Python", "OpenCV"],
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    type: "workshop",
    title: "AI & Cloud Workshop",
    org: "Google Developer Student Club",
    duration: "Aug 2024",
    description: "Completed a 3-day hands-on workshop on AI/ML with Google Cloud, covering AutoML, BigQuery, and Vertex AI.",
    skills: ["Google Cloud", "AutoML", "BigQuery"],
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    type: "leadership",

    skills: ["Leadership", "Communication", "Event Management"],
  },
];

export const stats = [
